subcodes.first_line: O Ashraf! Upon thee be the Glory of God! The world is in turmoil, and eyes are afflicted with blindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اشرف علیک بهاءالله عالم منقلب ابصار برمد مرمود
